$schema: Performance budget enforced in CI by tests/perf/check-bundle-budget.mjs
description: Hard ceilings on bundle and route-segment sizes. CI fails when any value is exceeded — bumping a budget should be a deliberate, reviewed decision, not a surprise.

totalJsKb.comment: Sum of every JS chunk in .next/static, gzipped (level 9). Comfortable ceiling for a 24-tool app; bump only when adding a heavy new dependency.

firstLoadJsKb.comment: Gzipped 'First Load JS shared by all'. React 19 + Next 15 framework + next-intl + lucide adds up here; ~250 KB is realistic, with 30 KB headroom for routine commits.

perRouteFirstLoadJsKb.comment: Per-route gzipped weight. ip-lookup is the heaviest at ~127 KB (Leaflet, multi-source panel) — 200 KB ceiling allows ~1.5× growth before tripping.
